violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls throughout the food prep and dish wash area noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exterior of hot holding shelves towels dispenser by hand sink exterior of cooking equipment computer monitors in food prep area and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the food prep area and around hand sink noted in need of cleaning. Heavy grease build up on floors near fryers and sandwich assembly line. Ceiling tiles around vents noted in need of cleaning.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Exterior of hot holding shelves towels dispenser by hand sink exterior of cooking equipment shelving in walk-in freezer noted with ice build up and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Heating and air-conditioner filters noted not cleaned and/or changed frequently enough to prevent contamination of food food prep surfaces equipment or utensils in establishment.
